name: @spences10/pi-telemetry
description: Pi extension for local SQLite telemetry of runs, turns, tools, and provider requests
author: Scott Spence <me@scottspence.com>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run build:self
scripts.check: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run check:self
scripts.test: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run test:self
